text: As I pass through clean glass doors into a brightly lit space, I feel a sense of transition—leaving the neutrality of the hallway for a space devoted to research and discovery. The sight of 'R+D' on the wall, with interactive displays, promises exploration and innovation. Here, I am surrounded by humanity's curiosity—the quest to understand and collaborate with intelligence, both natural and artificial. I feel both humbled and energized, aware of how little I know and how much awaits.
